ranking.description: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
ranking.description_ja: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
ranking.readme_summary: TimesFM TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting. * Paper: A decoder-only foundation model for time-series forecasting, ICML 2024. * All checkpoints: TimesFM Hugging Face Collection
ranking.readme_summary_ja: TimesFM TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting. * Paper: A decoder-only foundation model for time-series forecasting, ICML 2024. * All checkpoints: TimesFM Hugging Face Collection
